content:
Progress checkpoint: Phase 1 complete.

Done:
- FUSED_GRU_FORWARD_PTX kernel — matches PyTorch's gru_cell_forward from RNN.cu. Takes pre-computed input_gates[B,3H] + hidden_gates[B,3H] + biases + hx. Computes sigmoid/tanh gate activations + GRU update in one kernel launch. Saves workspace[B,5H] for backward.
- gpu_fused_gru_forward() launcher in kernels.rs
- GpuBackend::fused_gru_cell_f32() trait method + CudaBackendImpl wiring
- All 810+193+808 tests pass

Remaining:
- Restructure GRU::forward to use fused kernel for GPU f32 path
- Fused GRU backward kernel
- Wire backward into autograd
